sentences.target: Je cherche une protection pour mon téléphone.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ yn pʁɔtɛksjɔ̃ puʁ mɔ̃ telefɔn/

translations.fr: Je cherche une protection pour mon téléphone.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ yn pʁɔtɛksjɔ̃ puʁ mɔ̃ telefɔn/
translations.en: I'm looking for protection for my phone.
translations.es: Busco una funda para mi teléfono.
translations.de: Ich suche einen Schutz für mein Handy.
translations.it: Cerco una protezione per il mio telefono.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在找手机的保护配件。
translations.yue: 我想搵電話嘅保護配件。
translations.ru: Я ищу защиту для своего телефона.
translations.pt: Estou procurando uma capa para o meu celular.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm đồ bảo vệ cho điện thoại của mình.
translations.nl: Ik zoek bescherming voor mijn telefoon.
translations.uk: Я шукаю захист для свого телефона.
translations.hi: मैं अपने फोन के लिए सुरक्षा तलाश रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Ψάχνω προστασία για το τηλέφωνό μου.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter beskyttelse til telefonen min.
translations.id: Saya sedang mencari pelindung untuk ponsel saya.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter skydd till min telefon.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter beskyttelse til min telefon.
translations.ja: スマホの保護用品を探しています。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular subject pronoun; grammatical subject of the verb 'cherche'.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive, selects the direct object 'une protection'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner introducing the noun 'protection'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'cherche'.
Preposition introducing a purpose/beneficiary prepositional phrase.
Possessive determiner, 1st-person singular, masculine singular; modifies 'téléphone'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: Tu mets une protection avant de peindre.
sentences.reading: /ty mɛ yn pʁɔtɛksjɔ̃ avɑ̃ də pɛ̃dʁ/

translations.fr: Tu mets une protection avant de peindre.
translations.ipa: /ty mɛ yn pʁɔtɛksjɔ̃ avɑ̃ də pɛ̃dʁ/
translations.en: You put protection on before painting.
translations.de: Du legst einen Schutz aus, bevor du streichst.
translations.it: Metti una protezione prima di dipingere.
translations.zh-Hans: 在刷漆前先铺好防护布。
translations.yue: 喺油漆之前你會先鋪好保護布。
translations.ru: Перед покраской ты стелешь защитное покрытие.
translations.pt: Você coloca proteção antes de pintar.
translations.vi: Bạn trải lớp bảo vệ trước khi sơn.
translations.nl: Je legt bescherming neer voordat je gaat schilderen.
translations.uk: Перед фарбуванням ти стелиш захисне покриття.
translations.hi: पेंट करने से पहले तुम एक सुरक्षा शीट बिछाते हो.
translations.nb: Du legger beskyttelse før du maler.
translations.sv: Du lägger ut skydd innan du målar.
translations.ro: Pui protecție înainte de a vopsi.
translations.da: Du lægger beskyttelse ud, før du maler.
translations.ja: 塗装の前に保護シートを敷きます。

tokens.explanation: 2nd-person singular subject pronoun; grammatical subject of 'mets'.
Main verb in present indicative, 2nd person singular; transitive, takes 'une protection' as direct object.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner for 'protection'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'mets'.
Preposition of anteriority heading the phrase 'avant de peindre'.
Subordinating marker introducing the infinitival clause 'peindre' after 'avant'.
Infinitive verb; non-finite clausal complement of 'avant de'.

sentences.target: Cette veste offre une protection contre la pluie.
sentences.reading: /sɛt vɛst ɔfʁ yn pʁɔtɛksjɔ̃ kɔ̃tʁ la plɥi/

translations.fr: Cette veste offre une protection contre la pluie.
translations.ipa: /sɛt vɛst ɔfʁ yn pʁɔtɛksjɔ̃ kɔ̃tʁ la plɥi/
translations.en: This jacket offers protection against the rain.
translations.es: Esta chaqueta ofrece protección contra la lluvia.
translations.de: Diese Jacke bietet Schutz vor Regen.
translations.it: Questa giacca offre protezione dalla pioggia.
translations.pt: Esta jaqueta oferece proteção contra a chuva.
translations.he: המעיל הזה מעניק הגנה מפני הגשם.
translations.tr: Bu ceket yağmura karşı koruma sağlar.
translations.vi: Chiếc áo khoác này bảo vệ khỏi mưa.
translations.ar: هذه السترة توفر حماية من المطر.
translations.nl: Deze jas biedt bescherming tegen de regen.
translations.hu: Ez a kabát véd az eső ellen.
translations.hi: यह जैकेट बारिश से सुरक्षा देती है.
translations.pl: Ta kurtka zapewnia ochronę przed deszczem.
translations.el: Αυτό το μπουφάν προσφέρει προστασία από τη βροχή.
translations.nb: Denne jakken gir beskyttelse mot regn.
translations.id: Jaket ini memberikan perlindungan terhadap hujan.
translations.sv: Den här jackan ger skydd mot regn.
translations.ro: Această jachetă oferă protecție împotriva ploii.
translations.cs: Tato bunda poskytuje ochranu proti dešti.
translations.da: Denne jakke giver beskyttelse mod regn.
translations.ja: このジャケットは雨から守ってくれます。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; modifies 'veste'.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of the verb 'offre'.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive, takes 'une protection' as direct object.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner for 'protection'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'offre'.
Preposition introducing a PP expressing opposition/defense.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner for 'pluie'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'contre'.

sentences.target: Nous avons besoin de protection pour le colis.
sentences.reading: /nu avɔ̃ bəzwɛ̃ də pʁɔtɛksjɔ̃ puʁ lə kɔli/

translations.fr: Nous avons besoin de protection pour le colis.
translations.ipa: /nu avɔ̃ bəzwɛ̃ də pʁɔtɛksjɔ̃ puʁ lə kɔli/
translations.en: We need protection for the package.
translations.de: Wir brauchen Schutz für das Paket.
translations.it: Abbiamo bisogno di protezione per il pacco.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们需要给包裹加防护。
translations.yue: 我哋需要為個包裹做保護。
translations.pt: Precisamos de proteção para o pacote.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi cần bảo vệ cho kiện hàng.
translations.nl: We hebben bescherming nodig voor het pakket.
translations.hi: हमें पैकेज के लिए सुरक्षा की जरूरत है.
translations.ro: Avem nevoie de protecție pentru colet.
translations.da: Vi har brug for beskyttelse til pakken.
translations.ja: 荷物の保護が必要です。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person plural subject pronoun; grammatical subject of 'avons'.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person plural; part of the light-verb construction 'avoir besoin de'.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the object NP in the construction 'avoir besoin de'.
Preposition linking the noun 'besoin' to its complement 'protection'.
Common noun, feminine singular; complement of 'besoin' introduced by 'de'.
Preposition introducing a PP of destination/beneficiary.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner for 'colis'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'pour'.
